sections.title: Our Story
sections.body: Common Good Cocktail House is an extension of our living room. We created this space to bring people together over thoughtfully crafted cocktails in a warm, welcoming environment.

sections.title: What We Do
sections.body: We make modern, classic, upscale, and seasonal cocktails using quality spirits and house-made ingredients. Every drink is crafted with intention.

sections.heading: Common Good Cocktail Club
sections.subheading: When you subscribe, you unlock exclusive access to member pricing, early event reservations, and monthly cocktail kits delivered to your door.

sections.heading: Bottles & Merch
sections.subheading: Shop our curated selection of spirits, bar tools, and Common Good branded merchandise.

sections.heading: Cocktails To Go
sections.subheading: Order online to bring the Common Good experience anywhere. Bottled cocktails crafted fresh for your event or evening.

sections.heading: Memberships & Spirits
sections.subheading: Unlock exclusive access to member pricing, private events, and curated spirit selections.

sections.heading: Gift Cards
sections.subheading: Give the gift of Common Good. Perfect for any occasion.
